subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friend! From the time that you returned from the blessed Shrine to those regions and territories until now [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار روحانی از زمانی که از بقعه مبارکه رجوع به ان حدود و ثغور نمودید الی الان
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @being a source of light; guidance, @call to action, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
